name: Claude Code Platform Dev
postCreateCommand: mkdir -p ~/.local/bin && curl -sSLo ~/.local/bin/kind https://kind.sigs.k8s.io/dl/v0.30.0/kind-linux-amd64 && chmod +x ~/.local/bin/kind && echo 'export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH' >> ~/.zshrc && echo 'kind installed: '$(~/.local/bin/kind version) && npm i -g @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent@0.80.2 && echo 'pi installed: '$(pi --version) && pi install npm:context-mode && pi install npm:pi-web-access && pi install npm:pi-subagents && echo 'pi packages: '$(pi list | grep npm: | tr -d ' ' | paste -sd,)
